series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of this record series is to retain information on current requests for assistance being handled by agency of client name, address, type of case, staff assigned to case, important facts, activities on case, various information pertaining to case curently being handled by OLRS.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until case is closed or request for assistance is handled, then transfer to Client Information Sheets - Closed (CCF-3, Paper: Trash
